normalizeInputs.description:
Whether to normalize markdown inputs before comparison.
When true (default), both original and current are normalized
to canonical form before diffing, preventing false positives
from formatting differences.

readonly.description: Whether the viewer is read-only (hides revert buttons)

index.description: Index of this hunk in the list

originalStart.description: 1-based line number in original content where hunk starts

originalCount.description: Number of lines in original content affected by this hunk

currentStart.description: 1-based line number in current content where hunk starts

currentCount.description: Number of lines in current content affected by this hunk

lines.description: Line diffs within this hunk (includes context)

originalLines.description: Original lines that were changed/removed (for revert)

currentLines.description: Current lines that were added/modified (for reference)

hunks.description:
Bindable: reactive access to computed hunks.
Parent components can bind to this to reactively access hunk data.

viewMode.description:
Bindable: reactive access to current view mode.
Parent components can bind to control or observe the view mode.
